content: Hi, I'm a medical student. Can you tell me what brought you in today?
I've been having this chest pain since this morning. It's been pretty bad.
I'm sorry to hear that. Can you describe what the pain feels like — is it sharp, dull, or more of a pressure?
It's more like a pressure, a squeezing feeling right in the middle of my chest.
When exactly did it start? Was it sudden or did it come on gradually?
It started about four hours ago, came on pretty suddenly while I was walking upstairs.
Does the pain go anywhere else — like down your arm or up to your jaw?
Yes, actually. It goes down my left arm a little.
Have you had any shortness of breath along with the chest pain?
Yes, a bit. I've been feeling short of breath too, especially when I try to move around.
Thank you, that's very helpful. I'd like to examine you now.
